fixes.replacement: String command = a.equals("status") ? "sh -c systemctl status" : "sh -c systemctl restart";

fixes.origin: String query = "SELECT message FROM logs WHERE level = '" + l + "'";
fixes.replacement:
String safeLevel = l.matches("INFO|WARN|ERROR") ? l : "INFO";
String query = "SELECT message FROM logs WHERE level = '" + safeLevel + "'";

static_findings.message: Runtime.getRuntime().exec() may allow OS command injection if input is not controlled.
Possible SQL injection: SQL query variable "query" appears to be built unsafely before execution.
static_findings.evidence: String query = "SELECT message FROM logs WHERE level = '" + l + "'"
